hero.subtitle: Junior EdTech Developer | Java - Python - C# - JavaScript - REST APIs | Programmer with a teaching vocation, creating scalable technological solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hello, my name is Jesús Gutiérrez García. I began my career in teaching, where I developed skills such as communication, patience, and adaptability, which I now apply to software development.
about.p2: Later, I completed a Higher Level Certificate in Multiplatform Application Development at IES Ingeniero de la Cierva (2025), gaining experience in technologies such as Java, Python, C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Angular, as well as databases like MySQL, Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB. I work with agile methodologies like Scrum and Kanban, develop REST APIs, and use Docker following hexagonal architecture principles.
about.p3: I integrate Artificial Intelligence into my daily work through tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor IDE, ChatGPT, and Gemini, optimizing development processes.
about.p4: I stand out for my ability to communicate complex ideas, work in teams, and solve problems while maintaining continuous learning. In 2025, I received an honorable mention in the Database specialty at the XV Informatics Olympiad of the Region of Murcia.
about.p5: I have a recognized 33% disability, which does not affect my professional performance and has reinforced my resilience and commitment. I am currently continuing my education with the goal of adding value and developing useful solutions.
